title: The Clima-Tact Misfires
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on the clima-tact misfires, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Clima-Tact Misfires. Nami fights Miss Doublefinger and learns how to use Usopp’s strange weapon under deadly pressure. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The balls are ticking time- bombs! They'll still explode even if they don't hit you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He even takes into account the time limit for the bombs as he hits them!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: On the other hand, that also means they won't explode until the internal clock reaches zero. I tried exploiting that fact by throwing the bombs back,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But they're heavy as cannonballs! It's not something you can just catch and throw back!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: And yet if Mr. 4 can hit back these cannonballs at those speeds...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Happy New Year to the Day of the

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Creditors are required to determine how

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Holy Molly, just how heavy is that bat...!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: She looks just like a real 'mole!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Chopper, I'll leave the rest to you...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What happened to backing me up!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let my corpse rest in the seas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That was before I realized I had to fight that bizarre dog-like lifeform from Planet x and its freakishly strong monster- owner!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm only human! You can't expect me to fight non- humans!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, I'm just a human too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well your nose is too damn long to be human then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That ate the Inn Inn Fruit, Model: Pachshund

summary: This part develops the clima-tact misfires and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
